name: Rishiri Accuracy to Google Sheets
description: Blueprint for syncing Rishiri kelp forecast accuracy API data into Google Sheets. Configure Google credentials and sheet IDs inside n8n before activating.

workflow_0a_amedas_observation_sync.purpose: Split AMEDAS 04:00-16:00 observed weather rows into n8n items.
workflow_0a_amedas_observation_sync.code:
const rows = $json.rows || [];
return rows.map(row => ({ json: row }));

settings.note: upsert_key format: date|station_id|HH:MM. Run after AMEDAS archive collection at 03:00 JST.

workflow_0b_nowcast_observation_sync.purpose: Split saved nowcast mesh observation rows into n8n items.
workflow_0b_nowcast_observation_sync.code:
const rows = $json.rows || [];
return rows.map(row => ({ json: row }));

settings.note: upsert_key format: date|HH:MM|spot_name. Rows depend on app Redis snapshots from 04:00-16:00 JST.

workflow_0_forecast_snapshot_sync.purpose: Split saved forecast snapshot rows into n8n items. upsert_key is already returned by the API.
workflow_0_forecast_snapshot_sync.code:
const rows = $json.rows || [];
return rows.map(row => ({ json: row }));

settings.note: upsert_key format: forecast_date|spot_name|days_ahead. Run after the app's Redis snapshot at 16:05 JST.

workflow_a_raw_sync.purpose: Split API rows into n8n items. upsert_key is already returned by the API.
workflow_a_raw_sync.code:
const rows = $json.rows || [];
return rows.map(row => ({ json: row }));

workflow_b_summary_sync.purpose: Choose one table at a time, or duplicate this branch for each summary table.

settings.note: Duplicate the Code + Google Sheets pair for by_days_ahead, by_area, and by_buraku.

workflow_c_spot_master_sync.purpose: Split spot master rows before clearing the sheet; keep these items for the append step.
workflow_c_spot_master_sync.code:
const rows = $json.rows || [];
return rows.map(row => ({ json: row }));

settings.note: Append the items produced by the Code node, not the Clear Rows output.

safety_notes: This workflow reads the accuracy APIs only; it does not write to the Flask app.
Do not call /api/forecast for all 334 spots from n8n.
Run after 03:00 JST so the app has time to collect AMEDAS data.
Keep LINE notification automation separate to avoid duplicate sends.
